entry.title: Re-De-Centralizing Me
entry.summary:
Overview

The word data now symbolizes something much greater than the abstract dealings of quants, statisticians, and data scientists. Our data, including my data, is no longer under our control, the data owner. We are being duped into giving up our data in payment for simple apps that our community could easily provide for free. Let's take back our data. Let's take back the ownership of our data, our life story. Here's how...
